# Pull Request / 合并请求

## Summary / 摘要

- 

## Scope / 范围

- [ ] Website, cache, or API / 网页、缓存或 API
- [ ] OpenClaw collector integration / OpenClaw 采集集成
- [ ] Source extraction or fallback order / 源抽取或 fallback 顺序
- [ ] Model or summarize-pro chain / 模型或 summarize-pro 链路
- [ ] Channel push / 绑定 channel 推送
- [ ] Schedule, launchd, or operations / 定时任务与运维
- [ ] Privacy, audit, or health gates / 隐私、审计或巡检门禁
- [ ] Documentation only / 仅文档

## Dependency Impact / 依赖影响

- OpenClaw dependency changed: yes/no
- Node/npm dependency changed: yes/no
- External source, plugin, or service changed: yes/no
- Required `.env` keys changed: yes/no

Explain any change:

## Source and Fallback Impact / 采集源与 fallback 影响

- New source families:
- Changed fallback order:
- Known extraction limitations:
- Robots, license, or access notes:

## Model and summarize-pro Impact / 模型与 summarize-pro 影响

- Model wrapper changed: yes/no
- Kimi-specific behavior changed: yes/no
- Deterministic fallback changed: yes/no
- Prompt or summary format changed: yes/no

Explain any change:

## Channel, Schedule, and Gates / 推送、定时与门禁

- Channel push behavior changed: yes/no
- launchd or cron schedule changed: yes/no
- Health or privacy gate changed: yes/no
- Expected daily run count or time changed: yes/no

Explain any change:

## Privacy Checklist / 隐私检查

- [ ] No real token, API key, open_id, cookie, channel id, tunnel token, personal path, internal URL, or private source archive is committed.
- [ ] Logs and screenshots are redacted.
- [ ] `.env.example` documents any new configuration without real values.
- [ ] Generated cache, feedback, and runtime state are not committed unless intentionally provided as public sample data.
